violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The prep cooler across from the stove and flat grill had products above and below temp between 50 and 60 degrees. The air temp in the bottom of the cooler was 60 degrees. The pizza prep cooler near the pizza oven had products in the upper part temping between 60 and 65 degrees. The air temp on the bottom part of the cooler was 50 degrees. Coolers are not maintaining proper temperature.

Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. The hood system was inadequate at removing grease laden vapors from the kitchen when cooking food.--Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. The soup cooker was not under the hood system.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The handle on the right door of the reach in freezer by the mop sink is broken.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The fans in the kitchen need to be cleaned.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The hood system and filters need to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. The walls in the basement storage on the West end were not finished. Boxes of food, dishes, and utensils were being stored next to walls that were unfinished.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The ceiling in the kitchen around the vents needs to be cleaned. Walls in the kitchen need to be cleaned.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. The soup cooker was not under a hood system.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The side of the soda dispenser by the hand sink, and under the soda dispenser, needs to be cleaned. The bottom vent on the reach in freezer by the fryers needs to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A box of 16 oz plastic containers and lids was stored on the floor under the storage shelves at the bottom of the stairs.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
